sqlCommands.descr: update TransX set Flex3 = '2056' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '% %' or GL in ('1099917','2851017','2310003'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Flex4 is NULL
update TransX set Amt3 = Amt1 - Amt2, Amt5 = Amt1 - Amt4, Amt7 = Amt1 - Amt6 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex6 is null or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt4 = 0 and Amt6 = 0))
update TransX set Flex1 = Mapkey from TransX t inner join mapkeyranges m on t.GL >= m.fromGL and t.GL <=m.thruGL where keyID = '[batchID]' and mapkey like 'M1-2-7-%'
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Name from TransX t inner join mapkeys m on t.flex1 = m.mapkey where keyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is null
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = m.Name from TransX t inner join TPs m on t.TP = m.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '1. [CQ1] vs. [PQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt3)/1000,0) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '2. [CQ1] vs. [PYE1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt5)/1000,0) as Amt5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Period > 3 group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '3. [CQ1] vs. [PYCQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt7)/1000,0) as Amt7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Abs(Amt1) < 500

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data3', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '1. [CQ1] vs. [PQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt3)/1000,0) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data3', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '2. [CQ1] vs. [PYE1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt5)/1000,0) as Amt5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Period > 3 group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data3', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '3. [CQ1] vs. [PYCQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt7)/1000,0) as Amt7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '%97' or GL like '%98' or GL like '3%')
update TransX set Flex3 = '2124' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2880000'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0
update x set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX x inner join COA c on x.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update x set Flex3 = cast(m.Field2 as varchar) from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and x.GL like m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update x set Flex3 = cast(m.Field2 as varchar) from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and x.GL = m.Field3 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '(4) Re-entry'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3,Flex1, Co, GL, GLdesc, BusCat, TP, Amt1) (select KeyID, Flex3,'variance' as Flex1, Co, GL, GLdesc, BusCat, TP, round(sum(case when Flex1 = 'IFRS 4' then Amt1 else -Amt1 end),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Flex3, Co, GL, GLdesc, BusCat, TP)
update TransX set Flex3 = '3100' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('3870002','3870003')
update TransX set Flex3 = '2099' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1570000','2170000','2822000x','2822500x')
update TransX set Flex3 = 'FX Equity' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '35%'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'FH P&L' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('441','682')
update TransX set Flex3 = '4600' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('40','41','46','54','55') and BusCat in ('A','D')

update TransX set  TTY = '806' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('803','805','808','811','812') and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','221','282') and Zone in ('1','2')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, substring(GL,1,4) + ' ' + substring(GL,6,2) as GL, '' as BusCat, TP, PC,SubProd, Flex1, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('163','193','255','281') and not TTY in ('990','991'))
update TransX set Flex3 = '4603' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('54','55') or GL = '4600003') and BusCat in ('A','D')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, substring(GL,1,3) + ' ' + TTY as GL, '' as BusCat, TP, PC,SubProd, Flex1, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('148') and TTY in ('804'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data4', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '1. [CQ1] vs. [PQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt3)/1000,0) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data4', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '2. [CQ1] vs. [PYE1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt5)/1000,0) as Amt5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' and Period > 3 group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data4', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '3. [CQ1] vs. [PYCQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt7)/1000,0) as Amt7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Abs(Amt1) < 500
update TransX set Flex3 = '2380' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,5) in ('25500','28100','28551')
update TransX set Flex3 = '2383' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2150001','1935002')
update TransX set Flex3 = '2380' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL ='1310004'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, '5600052' as GL, 'A' as BusCat, TP, PC,SubProd, Flex1, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2880000' and not co like '599%')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt6 = 0
update TransX set TP = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (GL like '28999%' or GL like '28989%')
update TransX set Division = p.Division,  Region = p.Region, Location = p.Location, Zone = p.Zone from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Zone = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division in ('US_INS_OPS','LATAMER','FIRV','CORPORATE') and not Zone is NULL
update TransX set Region = Location, Zone = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division in ('EUROASIA','AMERICAS') and not Zone is NULL
update TransX set Division = Region, Region = Location, Zone = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division in ('LONDON_MKT') and not Zone is NULL
update TransX set Region = Division, Division = 'Other',  Zone = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Zone is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'B' and GL > '4000000'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'D' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'

Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','23') or substring(GL,1,3) in ('287','216','461') or GL in ('5600065','5600067','5600068')) and  not GL like '155%' and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '6%' or GL = '4498000')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set Flex1 = (case when Co like '599%' then 'Re-entry' else 'IFRS 4' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Amt1 = Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' = 'B' and Flex1 = 'IFRS 4'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1, Co, GL, BusCat, TP, Amt1,Flex4) (select KeyID, Flex1, Co, GL, BusCat, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2), 'pass1' as Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, Flex1, Co, GL, BusCat, TP)
update TransX set Region = 'AMER_MISC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division = 'AMERICAS' and Region = ''
update TransX set Flex3 = '4610' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('40','41','46','54','55') and BusCat = 'C'
update TransX set Flex3 = '5650' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '53%' or GL = '5600050') and BusCat in ('A','D')
update TransX set Flex3 = '5665' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '53%' or GL = '5600050') and BusCat = 'C'
update TransX set Flex3 = '5652' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('50','51','52') or GL = '5600052') and BusCat in ('A','D')
update TransX set Flex3 = '5667' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('50','51','52') or GL = '5600067') and BusCat = 'C'
update TransX set Flex3 = '2393' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2150003')
update TransX set Flex3 = '1593' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1560003')
update TransX set Flex3 = '1580' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('1586','2480')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Abs(Amt1) < 500

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, '401' + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1, Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '6' and GL like '131%')
update TransX set Flex3 = '1580' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2160000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, substring(GL,1,5) + ' 0' as GL, '' as BusCat, TP, PC,SubProd, Flex1, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2855100')
update TransX set Flex3 = '1585' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL = '1560002' or substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','149'))
update TransX set Flex3 = 'FH P&L' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex3,'') = ''
update TransX set Flex3 = 'FX P&L' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,4) in ('4397','4398') and coalesce(Flex3,'') = ''

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,GLdesc,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Yr,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3) (Select '[batchID]',Node_ID, Node_Name, Parent, Node_Owner, Sort_Key, Notes, CreatedBy, convert(varchar,CreatedOn,101) as CreatedOn from ccNodes)
update TransX set Flex2 = substring(Flex2,11,99) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(Flex2,1,10) = 'ODYSSEYRE\'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2,TTY) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2, '801' as TTY from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '6' and GL like '131%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, '231 806' as GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '6' and GL like '231%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Division, Region, Amt1, Amt2, Amt4, Amt6, Flex6) (select KeyID, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Division, Region, ROUND(-SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, ROUND(-SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, ROUND(-SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, ROUND(-SUM(COALESCE(Amt6,0)),2) as Amt6, 'pass1' as Flex6  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Division, Region)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, substring(GL,1,3) + (case when TTY = '815' then ' 815' else ' 804' end) as GL, '' as BusCat, TP, PC,SubProd, Flex1, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('161','241','441','682') and Co < '5990')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, substring(GL,1,3) + ' ' + TTY as GL, '' as BusCat, TP, PC,SubProd, Flex1, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('131','132','148','149','221','222','231','232','282') and TTY in ('805','806','807','809','815'))
update TransX set Flex3 = '2056' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '35%' and TTY = '815'
update TransX set Flex3 = '2056' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '4398%' and coalesce(Flex3,'') = '' and TTY = '815'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data3',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M18')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd,TTY,Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select '[batchID]-data2', Zone, Co, GL, BusCat, TP, PC,SubProd, TTY, Flex1, Amt1, Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, BusCat,TP,PC,SubProd, Flex1, Amt1,Amt2) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, substring(GL,1,3) + ' ' + TTY as GL, '' as BusCat, TP, PC,SubProd, Flex1, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('169','229') and TTY in ('815'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '815' and not Zone = '815'
update TransX set  TTY = '806' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY = '' and not '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('131') and Zone in ('1','2')
